display_text: Dagon (Level 5), Cost: 6250: Instantly deals 800 magical damage to a single target enemy and heals the caster for 75% of the damage dealt (600 HP). Instantly kills illusions. High burst damage tool for finishing low-health heroes or deleting key targets. Stats: CD: 27s, Mana: 200, Range: 600.
